title: Noah Lucas homepage v041 employer briefs
changeSummary: Simplifies the hero to name, hero phrase, subtext, Methods, Skills, Expertise, and two explicit contact actions.
Keeps the company-logo row directly below the hero.
Reformats every employer card into employer one-liner, role title, company and dates, JTBD, workflows, CV-backed impact, and company link.
Makes impact evidence visible instead of requiring an overlay interaction.
Keeps the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local source validation plus public staging browser check after GitHub Pages deployment.
